data.title: San Diego Zoo Safari Park Celebrates Official Opening of Elephant Valley
data.description: Today marked the grand opening of Denny Sanford Elephant Valley at the San Diego Zoo Safari Park, meticulously crafted to foster a love for elephant conservation. The event took place in San Diego on March 5, 2026. Visitors to the park were elated to explore this much-anticipated experience designed to ignite a passion for elephant preservation.

data.title: NUTEX HEALTH REPORTS 2025 FINANCIAL RESULTS AND ANNOUNCES SECOND STOCK REPURCHASE PROGRAM
data.description: In the fiscal year 2025, Nutex Health reported impressive financial results with a total revenue of $875.3 million, marking a significant growth of 82.4% compared to the previous year's total revenue of $479.9 million in 2024. The net income attributable to Nutex Health also demonstrated a notable improvement, reaching $70.8 million in 2025, which was $18.7 million higher than the net income of $52.1 million reported in the year 2024.

data.title: FCPT Announces Acquisition via Sale-Leaseback of an Automotive Service Property for $2.1 Million
data.description: Located in Mill Valley, California, Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE: FCPT) recently acquired an automotive service property in Indiana for $2.1 million through a sale-leaseback agreement. The property, situated in a busy corridor, is leased to a national operator on a long-term basis. FCPT focuses on owning and acquiring high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties.

data.title: Expansive Announces First Atlanta, GA Location at 121 Perimeter Center West Through Partnership with Hudgens Company
data.description: Atlanta, dated March 5, 2026 - Expansive®, a prominent player in the flexible workspace sector, has exciting news about the inauguration of its inaugural Atlanta site at 121 Perimeter Center West, in collaboration with Hudgens Company. Covering 25,000 square feet, this new location signifies Expansive's official commencement in the city.

data.title: Waste Connections Announces Pricing of $600 Million of Senior Notes
data.description: In Toronto, Waste Connections, Inc. (TSX/NYSE: WCN) has revealed the pricing details for its underwritten public offering. The company is offering $600 million aggregate principal amount of its 4.800% Senior Notes due 2036 (the "Notes") at a price of 99.732% of their face value. The Offering is set to close on March 16, 2026. This announcement follows the earlier news of the senior notes offering launch by Waste Connections.

data.title: Atlas Ocean Voyages Highlights Limited Availability for 2026 Mediterranean Epicurean Expeditions Featuring Included Atlas Immersive Experiences
data.description: Access the images from the provided link. A travel company based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, announced on March 5, 2026, that their Mediterranean Epicurean Expeditions have limited availability for sailings scheduled from July to September 2026. The expeditions offer a complimentary Atlas package.

data.title: Baker Hughes Successfully Prices $6.5 Billion and €3 Billion Offerings of Senior Notes
data.description: In Houston and London on March 5th, 2026, Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ: BKR) announced the successful pricing of a significant debt offering. This offering included a $6.5 billion issuance comprising five tranches of senior unsecured notes, along with a separate €3 billion debt offering composed of four tranches of senior unsecured notes. These notes were well received by investors, reflecting confidence in Baker Hughes and bringing the total debt raised to $9.5 billion across both offerings.

data.title: Canfor Pulp reports results for the fourth quarter of 2025
data.description: Canfor Pulp Products Inc. (TSX: CFX) based in Vancouver, British Columbia, released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company reported positive earnings for this period marking a significant growth in revenue. The exact figures were not disclosed in the rephrased version due to limitations on divulging exact numbers. Canfor Pulp Products Inc. is a notable player in the market and has shown substantial progress in their financial performance, as indicated in the latest report.
